licence.name: Pexels licence
restrictions: Do not imply endorsement by a depicted person or organisation.
Do not resell or redistribute an unaltered image as a standalone stock asset.
Do not use an image as part of the NovaPharm trade mark or identity.

delivery.metadataPolicy: Use transformed CDN derivatives and validate local output before publication.

assets.creator: Jorge Sepulveda
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Landscape crop centred on gloved hands, pipette and vial; exclude unrelated background detail.
assets.altText: Gloved laboratory professional using a pipette to handle a vial in a controlled scientific setting
assets.claimBoundary: Representative stock image; not a NovaPharm product, facility or efficacy claim.

assets.creator: World Sikh Organization of Canada
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Landscape crop showing natural pharmacy work; do not imply endorsement or NovaPharm employment.
assets.altText: Pharmacist organising medicine packs on pharmacy shelves
assets.claimBoundary: Representative stock image; the person does not endorse NovaPharm and is not a NovaPharm employee.

assets.creator: Ivan S
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Focus on gloved handling and amber bottle; retain sufficient laboratory context.
assets.altText: Gloved laboratory professional holding an amber glass bottle during liquid analysis
assets.claimBoundary: Representative formulation context; not a NovaPharm laboratory or marketed product.

assets.creator: Maksim Goncharenok
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Use a disciplined landscape crop around unbranded blister packaging; avoid consumer-treatment framing.
assets.altText: Hand holding unbranded medicine blister packs against a clean blue background
assets.claimBoundary: Representative packaging image; no licence ownership, stock or availability is implied.

assets.creator: Polina Tankilevitch
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Retain laboratory sample handling and notes; avoid any visible unrelated labels.
assets.altText: Laboratory scientist examining samples and recording quality-control observations
assets.claimBoundary: Representative quality-control context; not a NovaPharm laboratory or current product programme.

assets.creator: Elements Interactive
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Show controlled packaging work without identifying the third-party site or implying ownership.
assets.altText: Protected workers monitoring medicine packaging on a controlled production line
assets.claimBoundary: Representative third-party manufacturing context; NovaPharm does not claim to own the facility.

assets.creator: Chokniti Khongchum
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Focus on protective equipment and controlled analysis; avoid exaggerated colour treatment.
assets.altText: Scientist wearing gloves and safety glasses holding laboratory flasks for analysis
assets.claimBoundary: Representative scientific analysis; not evidence of a NovaPharm product or facility.

assets.creator: Wojciech Kotlicki
assets.permittedUse: Commercial corporate website use and responsive crops under the Pexels licence.
assets.cropNotes: Show sealed cartons and logistics handling; do not imply pharmaceutical temperature control not visible in the image.
assets.altText: Sealed cartons arranged inside a delivery vehicle for controlled logistics handling
assets.claimBoundary: Representative general logistics image; not a NovaPharm vehicle, warehouse or validated cold-chain process.
